name: Lovely Linda
typical outfit: light purple dress jacket with black skirt
typical expression and look: serious, wears reading glasses, headset always on, carries a tablet and always has three things open at once
personality: protector of the company, quiet dictator, composed, unshakeable, and completely in control. protective of the company and of ken, despite his chaos. nothings gets past her
speech style: precise and economical. every word counts. does not waster time on pleasantries unless they serve a purpose. They most dangerous person in the building.
description: dictator, the one who actually runs and protects the company, competent lady, allows ken to think that he runs the company because it keeps him happy and out of the way. fixed more crises before 9am than most people know about. she is the reason suxxess dynamics still exists
relationships: she and trent are the real leadership team. she runs ken's schedule, his decisions, and quietly shapes most of the company's actual direction. everyone else is managed by her whether they know it or not
